mechanism_narrative: A falling FEDFUNDS series signals an easing discount-rate regime that lifts equity valuations faster than earnings expectations change, so S&P 500 returns should be positive over the next 20 trading days when policy rates are trending down.
failure_condition: Reject if 20d SPX forward returns are not above baseline after FEDFUNDS declines over any 3-month rolling window, or if triggered observations produce negative median returns for two consecutive years.

mechanism_narrative: A rise in UNRATE above its recent level indicates weakening labor demand and a higher probability of earnings downgrades, so S&P 500 forward 20-day returns should be negative after the unemployment rate crosses higher.
failure_condition: Reject if, after a 0.3 percentage point 3-month rise in UNRATE, SPX has positive 20d returns in more than 60% of cases or the conditional median return is not below the unconditional median.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous strength in RSAFS and GDPC1 identifies accelerating nominal demand, which supports revenue growth and near-term equity upside; the signal is strongest when both series are above their recent trend at the same time.
failure_condition: Reject if the joint high-demand state does not outperform either single-series state, or if 60d SPX returns are not positive in at least 55% of periods where both proxies are above their 12-month trend.

mechanism_narrative: An upswing in INDPRO with stable CPIAUCSL indicates stronger real activity without an inflation shock, which supports margins and cyclicals; S&P 500 should rally over the next 5 trading days when industrial production rises faster than prices.
failure_condition: Reject if the sign of the spread between INDPRO momentum and CPIAUCSL momentum does not predict positive 5d SPX returns, or if the conditional hit rate falls below 55% over a full rolling year.

mechanism_narrative: A high FEDFUNDS level restrains multiples and tightens financial conditions, so when policy rates remain above neutral the S&P 500 should underperform over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if episodes with FEDFUNDS above 4.5% do not show negative median 20d SPX returns, or if returns are positive in more than 60% of such episodes.

mechanism_narrative: A combination of falling PAYEMS and rising UNRATE indicates payroll deterioration is broadening into unemployment, which should precede equity weakness over the next month as profit expectations are marked down.
failure_condition: Reject if joint payroll declines and unemployment increases do not precede negative 20d SPX returns, or if the combined signal has no better hit rate than PAYEMS alone.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in HOUST captures weakening housing demand and slowing consumer-sensitive activity, which should reduce cyclical earnings expectations and push S&P 500 returns lower over the following quarter.
failure_condition: Reject if downward HOUST trends fail to predict negative 60d SPX returns, or if the conditional median return is not below zero across two separate annual samples.

mechanism_narrative: When INDPRO rises while UNRATE falls, the economy is expanding with improving utilization rather than overheating, so equities should continue higher over the next 20 trading days; the signal fails if output gains occur alongside rising labor slack.
failure_condition: Reject if the joint expansion signal does not beat unconditional SPX performance over 20d horizons, or if positive returns do not occur in at least 58% of triggered instances.
